title: Assignment and Reassignment Check
description: `=`, compound operators, and `const` rebinding vs mutation.

questions.explanation: `points` becomes `12` via `+=` and `-=`. Mutating `player.score` on a `const` object is allowed.
`const` locks the variable binding. Reassigning the variable itself throws.
Compound assignment updates the variable from its current value. `=` assigns; `===` compares.
Changing `limits.max` is fine. Rebinding `limits` to a new object violates `const`.
